shared.footer.brand_p: Tailored software, automation, and applied AI for service SMEs. We understand our clients' business, not just the code.

index.meta.title: Tailored Software for SMEs | MJM Solutions
index.meta.description: Portuguese boutique specializing in tailored software, automation, and applied AI. Platforms in production, case-by-case proposals. Free 30-minute diagnostic.
index.meta.ogTitle: Tailored Software for SMEs | MJM Solutions
index.meta.ogDescription: We don't sell off-the-shelf packages. Tailored software, automation, and applied AI for real tasks. Free 30-minute diagnostic.
index.hero.h1:
The software
molds itself to
your problem.
Not the other way around.
index.hero.intro_p: We don't sell off-the-shelf packages. We listen to your problems and design real solutions — tailored platforms, process automation, or AI-powered tools. We build what your company actually needs.
index.marquee: Case-by-case solutions  ·  100% client-owned code  ·  Close follow-up  ·  Warranty period after delivery  ·  Case-by-case solutions  ·  100% client-owned code  ·  Close follow-up  ·  Warranty period after delivery  ·
index.stats.h2: For those who want to save hours, reduce manual errors, and decide with data.
index.stats.label: (02) — How we work
index.stats.row1_p: No two companies are alike. Our work always starts by understanding where you're losing the most time and money.
index.stats.row2_p: All the code and documentation we produce becomes your property. No lock-in.
index.stats.row3_p: A frank conversation. We come away having identified the 2 or 3 main areas for improvement in your operation.
index.servicos.lede: The starting point is your real process. If it doesn't make sense to build software, we'll be the first to tell you not to.
index.servicos.row1_desc: Systems designed around your processes. We build the exact tool you need to run your business. — Tailored software
index.servicos.row2_desc: Repetitive, tedious tasks get taken over by software: faster, error-free, and around the clock. — Automation
index.servicos.row3_desc: We build the missing bridges between the systems your company already uses. No painful migrations — just getting everything to speak the same language. — Integrations
index.servicos.row4_desc: Reading invoices from a photo, extracting data from PDFs, classifying information automatically. Applied AI for real day-to-day work. — Applied AI
index.prova.h2: Built for those who want to move beyond spreadsheets
index.prova.a_h3: We understand business, not just code
index.prova.a_p: We have backgrounds in management, economics, and engineering. We speak your language: costs, P&L, and processes — not just tech jargon.
index.prova.b_p: We work closely and transparently. No disappearing for months. We're a message or call away for whatever you need.
index.prova.c_p: We work in an agile way. You'll watch the software come to life bit by bit, so we can adjust course together.
index.prova.d_p: We know that, in practice, adjustments tend to come up. After delivery, we guarantee a free period for fine-tuning and fixes. All agreed transparently upfront.
index.casos.eyebrow: (05) — What we already know how to build
index.casos.c1_t: Invoices and documents that handle themselves
index.metodo.h2:
No complications.
The focus is your problem.
index.metodo.lede: Three simple steps, from the first diagnostic to delivery with a warranty.
index.metodo.c1_p: To understand your operation in detail. We identify areas for improvement and give an honest recommendation. No commitment.
index.metodo.c2_p: Every project is different. We design the solution for your specific problem and present a budget and timeline suited to your reality.
index.metodo.c3_p: We build the solution keeping you in the loop throughout. When we deliver, we offer a contractually defined warranty and fix period, to make sure everything works as it should.
index.sobre.quote: "We understand our clients' business, not just code."
index.sobre.p1: We're three co-founders with complementary backgrounds: Economics, Finance, and Engineering (Nova SBE · Nova FCT). We've lived the operation from the inside, and started building software because we saw too many hours being lost to manual tasks.
index.sobre.p2: We're pragmatic: we find the problem, we design the solution. And honesty above all — if it doesn't make sense to move forward, we'll tell you in the very first meeting.
index.sobre.dd1: If it doesn't make sense, we'll say so.
index.cta.label: (08) — Start here
index.cta.h2: If the process fits on a sheet of paper or a spreadsheet, we'll optimize it.
index.cta.note: Tell us your problem. If we can help, we'll tell you how. If we're not the right fit, we'll tell you that too.

servicos.meta.title: Tailored Software, Integrations, Automation and AI | MJM Solutions
servicos.meta.description: Four ways to solve operational problems with technology: tailored software, automation, integrations and applied AI. The starting point is always your real process.
servicos.hero.p: Not a catalog, not fixed packages. Four ways to solve operational problems with technology. In every one, the starting point is your real process, not a pre-made product.
servicos.s1.tech: Technology: modern web applications (TypeScript), hosted on European cloud infrastructure.
servicos.s1.a_p: Platforms and management systems designed from scratch for your company's processes. The software adapts to the operation, never the other way around.
servicos.s1.b_ul:
• You run the operation on spreadsheets (or other outdated tools) that only one person understands.
  • The off-the-shelf software you bought forces the team into workarounds and patches.
  • You have a unique process that no off-the-shelf product covers.
servicos.s1.c_ul:
• Reporting platform for financial services: data from multiple sources consolidated, with per-client reports.
  • Hotel back-office: invoice capture by photo, cost control and automatic monthly P&L.
  • Internal portal for managing requests between departments.
servicos.s1.d_ul:
• A web app accessible from any device.
  • User manual and team training.
  • Code and documentation, owned by the client.
servicos.s2.tech: Technology: automations and workers on European cloud infrastructure, with monitoring and failure alerts.
servicos.s2.a_p: We identify the most costly repetitive manual tasks in your operation and put software to do them: faster, with far fewer errors, at any hour.
servicos.s2.b_ul:
• Reports that take a whole day to put together.
  • Routine emails written one by one.
  • Checks and reconciliations done line by line.
servicos.s2.c_ul:
• Automatic generation of monthly management reports.
  • Reconciliation of bank transactions against invoicing, with discrepancies flagged.
  • Automatic detection of duplicate invoices before payment.
servicos.s2.d_ul:
• An automated process in production.
  • Alerts when something fails.
  • Measurement of time saved.
servicos.s3.tech: Technology: APIs, webhooks and custom connectors; European infrastructure.
servicos.s3.a_p: Pieces of software that connect the systems you already use and fill the gaps between them. Nothing gets replaced, no painful migration.
servicos.s3.b_ul:
• Someone on the team copies data from one program to another every week.
  • Your ERP or CRM handles 80% of what you need, and the other 20% is done by hand.
  • You want reports that combine data from two systems that don't talk to each other.
servicos.s3.c_ul:
• Connection between billing software and a treasury control spreadsheet.
  • Daily import of transactions and positions from banking platforms for reporting.
  • Automatic exports to the accountant in the right format.
servicos.s4.tech: Technology: recent AI models; data handled in compliance with GDPR.
servicos.s4.a_p: We apply advanced AI models to concrete tasks in your operation. No surface-level chatbots: AI doing work that today is done by people, hour after hour.
servicos.s4.b_ul:
• The team spends hours reading documents and entering data into systems.
  • You receive information in messy formats (PDFs, emails, photos) that someone has to sort out.
  • You want quick answers about company data without waiting for reports.
servicos.s4.c_ul:
• Automatic reading of supplier invoices from photos, extracting NIF (Portuguese tax ID), amounts and supplier classification.
  • Reading client documents at onboarding (KYC): data extracted and verified automatically.
  • Automatic classification and routing of requests received by email.
servicos.s4.d_ul:
• An AI workflow in production, with human validation where it makes sense.
  • Accuracy measurement.
  • Transparent usage costs.
servicos.para_quem.p: We work with service SMEs of every kind: from clinics to construction firms, from financial services to logistics operators. We have software in production in hospitality and property management, and we understand the business from the inside. The method applies to any operation: if you have a slow process, a task to automate or an idea to turn into software, it's worth a 30-minute conversation.
servicos.cta.label: (03) — Start here
servicos.cta.h2: Not sure which one fits your problem?
servicos.cta.note: That's exactly what the diagnostic is for. Tell us about the process and we'll tell you what makes sense — build, integrate, automate, or nothing at all.

casos.meta.title: Examples by Sector: What We Build | MJM Solutions
casos.meta.description: Six examples of what we build, one per sector: industry, healthcare, transport, retail, financial services, and professional services. From AI invoice reading to automatic reconciliation.
casos.hero.p: Every sector has its bottlenecks. Six examples, one per sector, of what we know how to build — from automatic invoice reading to demand forecasting and financial reconciliation.
casos.c1.h2: Invoices and documents that handle themselves
casos.c1.a_p: An industrial company was entering supplier invoices and documents into the system by hand, which caused delays, errors, and hours spent on repetitive tasks.
casos.c1.b_p: We built a flow that reads, validates, and records everything on its own:
casos.c1.step1: Document capture via optical scanning and layout analysis
casos.c1.step2: Duplicate detection before the entry is recorded
casos.c1.step3: Automatic classification by supplier and cost category
casos.c1.step4: Validation against business rules and entry into the system
casos.c1.c_p: What used to take too long now happens in a fraction of the time. Errors no longer slip through unnoticed, and the team traded data entry for work that actually needs people.
casos.c2.a_p: A healthcare provider received hundreds of messages a day, from clinics and from patients, and sorting them all by hand was slow, inconsistent, and delayed urgent cases.
casos.c2.b_p: We built an engine that reads, classifies, and routes each message in real time:
casos.c2.step1: Tagging by topic and by priority
casos.c2.step4: Extraction and organization of the data that matters
casos.c2.c_p: Urgent cases now reach the people who resolve them first, simple messages close on their own, and the team moves from manual triage to work that adds real value.
casos.c3.a_p: A transport operator received many repeated requests, which led to long waits, inconsistent answers, and high support costs, especially whenever there were service disruptions.
casos.c3.b_p: We built a conversational agent that handles first-line support across multiple channels:
casos.c3.step1: Automatic answers to the most common requests
casos.c3.step3: A central knowledge base for consistent answers
casos.c3.step4: A smooth handoff to a person for complex cases
casos.c3.c_p: Customers get an answer any time, the answers stay consistent across every channel, and the team is freed up for the cases that truly need human judgment.
casos.c4.a_p: A retail company planned purchasing and stock based on loose estimates, which led to waste during slow periods and stockouts during peak demand.
casos.c4.b_p: We connected demand forecasting to day-to-day planning:
casos.c4.step1: Demand forecasting by product and by period
casos.c4.step3: Purchase planning aligned with the forecast
casos.c4.step4: Real-time tracking of deviation from plan
casos.c4.c_p: Purchasing now follows real demand, waste went down, and planning stopped reacting and started anticipating.
casos.c5.h2: The right information, without the search
casos.c5.a_p: A professional services firm lost hours reading contracts and documents to find clauses, deadlines, and figures — manual, repetitive work at risk of missing something important.
casos.c5.b_p: We built a system that reads the documents and returns what matters:
casos.c5.step2: Extraction of the relevant clauses, deadlines, and figures
casos.c5.step3: Alerts for dates and obligations that need to be met
casos.c5.step4: Everything organized in one searchable place
casos.c5.c_p: Information is now at hand instead of buried in the pages, deadlines stopped slipping through, and the team focuses on deciding instead of searching.
casos.c6.a_p: A financial services firm consolidated data from banks, platforms, and spreadsheets by hand to reconcile transactions and prepare client reports — a slow close, with errors that were hard to catch, always up against the deadline.
casos.c6.b_p: We automated the full circuit, from data collection to the final report:
casos.c6.step1: Automatic collection of statements and transactions from multiple sources
casos.c6.step3: Per-client reports generated in the right format
casos.c6.c_p: A close that took days now takes hours, discrepancies surface first instead of slipping through, and the team spends its time analyzing instead of checking lines.
casos.proximos.p: This page grows project by project. The next cases, with measured results, land here as soon as they're in production.
casos.cta.label: (09) — Start here
casos.cta.note: Thirty minutes on your process — and you'll leave knowing what would be worth building.

como-trabalhamos.meta.title: Method and Case-by-Case Pricing | MJM Solutions
como-trabalhamos.meta.description: How we work: free diagnostic, design and proposal, development and delivery with a guarantee. Case-by-case pricing and code that's always yours.
como-trabalhamos.hero.h1:
No complications.
The focus is your problem.
como-trabalhamos.hero.p: Consultative, not transactional. The first conversation is about your operation, never about a catalog. We'd rather lose a project than build something that shouldn't exist.
como-trabalhamos.metodo.i_p1: Conversation about the operation and identification of the 2 or 3 most costly processes.
como-trabalhamos.metodo.i_p2: What you get — a written summary with the main areas for improvement identified and an honest recommendation: build, integrate, automate, or do nothing.
como-trabalhamos.metodo.ii_p1: We map the process in detail with your team, design the solution and break it down into phases.
como-trabalhamos.metodo.ii_p2: What you get — a proposal with a defined scope and timeline, and visual mock-ups of what will be built.
como-trabalhamos.metodo.iii_p1: Development in short cycles, with regular demos. Your team sees and uses the software before it's finished.
como-trabalhamos.metodo.iii_p2: What you get — early access to the test version and adjustments based on real-world use.
como-trabalhamos.metodo.iv_p1: Team training, going live, and a warranty period for fine-tuning included.
como-trabalhamos.metodo.iv_p2: What you get — a user manual, code and documentation (yours to own), and the option of a maintenance and evolution retainer.
como-trabalhamos.compra.lede: Fixed price per proposal, the right to stop at the end of each phase, and code that's always yours.
como-trabalhamos.compra.c1_p: To understand where it hurts before you invest.
como-trabalhamos.compra.c2_p: Software built in short cycles, with fixed price and timeline per phase, and the right to stop at the end of each one.
como-trabalhamos.compra.c3_p: Ongoing maintenance and evolution. No hidden lock-in.
como-trabalhamos.compra.l1: Proposals with a fixed price per phase. No surprises, no invisible hour-counters.
como-trabalhamos.compra.l2: The right to stop at the end of each phase. Each phase delivers value on its own; if you stop, you keep what was built.
como-trabalhamos.compra.l3: No hidden lock-in. The code is yours; the relationship continues because it works, not because you're stuck.
como-trabalhamos.garantias.g1_p: Code, documentation, access and data belong to the client. No hidden dependency.
como-trabalhamos.garantias.g2_p: Everything documented so another developer can pick up the work. It's the answer to the fear of "what if they disappear?".
como-trabalhamos.garantias.g3_p: European infrastructure, controlled access, and documented data handling.
como-trabalhamos.garantias.g4_p: If a request doesn't make technical or economic sense, we'll say so and propose an alternative.
como-trabalhamos.faq.a1: You do. All code, documentation and access belong to the client at the end of the project.
como-trabalhamos.faq.q2: What if I need maintenance? +
como-trabalhamos.faq.a2: We offer maintenance and evolution retainers. And since the code is yours and documented, any competent developer can continue the work.
como-trabalhamos.faq.q3: How much does it cost? +
como-trabalhamos.faq.a3: It depends on the problem, but it's never a bottomless pit: case-by-case proposals, with the right to stop at the end of each phase.
como-trabalhamos.faq.q4: What if the developer disappears? +
como-trabalhamos.faq.a4: The code is yours and documented so another developer can continue it. You're not locked into anyone — it's precisely the opposite of a closed box.
como-trabalhamos.faq.a5: Hosted on European infrastructure, with controlled access and GDPR compliance. We explain exactly where your data is kept.
como-trabalhamos.cta.label: (06) — Start here
como-trabalhamos.cta.note: Thirty minutes, a frank conversation, and an honest recommendation at the end.

sobre.meta.title: About Us | MJM Solutions
sobre.meta.description: Three co-founders with complementary backgrounds — economics and finance, and engineering. We understand the client's business, not just the code.
sobre.hero.p: Before you call us, it's fair to know who we are. Here we are.
sobre.historia.quote: "We understand the client's business, not just the code."
sobre.historia.a_p: We are three co-founders with complementary backgrounds — economics and finance, and engineering. We lived real operations from the inside (hospitality, asset management, P&L, USALI) and built software because we saw the hours slipping away. The first system was born to solve a problem of our own, not to sell.
sobre.historia.b_p: We believe this is one of our biggest differences: we understand the client's business, not just the code. Many software teams have never had to close a GOP or reconcile a USALI — we've been there, and we speak the language of whoever runs the operation.
sobre.porque.p: We work with few clients at a time so that every project gets our direct attention, from diagnostic to launch. There are no layers of intermediaries between who decides and who builds.
sobre.porque.dd1: If it doesn't make sense, we'll say so.
sobre.equipa.i_ul:
• — Bachelor's in Economics, Nova SBE
  • — Master's in Finance, Nova SBE
  • — Financial management, P&L and development
sobre.equipa.ii_ul:
• — Electrical Engineering, Nova FCT
  • — Software and systems development
  • — Integrations and product management
sobre.equipa.iii_ul:
• — Electrical Engineering, Nova FCT
  • — Development and automation
  • — Applied AI and technical architecture
sobre.cta.label: (04) — Get started
sobre.cta.note: Thirty minutes, no commitment. Tell us where it hurts and we'll tell you if and how technology solves it.

contactos.meta.title: Talk to Us: Free Diagnostic | MJM Solutions
contactos.meta.description: Does a process cost your team hours every week? Tell us about it. In 30 minutes we'll tell you if and how technology can solve it. No commitment.
contactos.hero.p: Does a process cost your team hours every week? Tell us about it. In 30 minutes we'll tell you if and how technology can solve it. No commitment, no catalog-style presentations.
contactos.booking.title: Send us a message
contactos.booking.l_notas: Describe the problem in 2 or 3 sentences
contactos.direct.note: Prefer to write? Email us at the address on the side — we reply within 1 business day.
